title: Kimnix Smart Watch 2022(Make Call Receive/Dial), 1.72 in HD Full Touch Screen Fitness Tracker with Bluetooth Call/Text/Heart Rate/SpO2/Sleep Monitor Smartwatch for Android iOS Mens Women (Black)

reviews.title: Fair features for the price
reviews.text:
First of all, you must keep in consideration that this is a $50 watch. That being said I will state what I consider are the pros and cons:

Pros
Price, battery life (more than the typical 1-day of apple watches), capable of answering and dialing within the watch (Bluetooth required) and blood oxygen and heart rate sensors.

Cons
Strap does not hold to watch and you must keep correcting it (solved with another strap?), blood pressure monitor? How???, you only have five watch faces at any given time but you can only replace one of the five - the others are permanently set, you get to edit the fourth one by adding a photo

Overall, there are cheaper and better watches like the WYZE (which I own and has better quality) but lack the phone answering and dialing features.

I will be replacing the strap with another type to see if it holds.

reviews.title: It does not keep all of the apps current. That is what I bought it for.
reviews.text: I bought this watch per my doctors request to keep health issues.  I only use it for this feature.  But to my amazement, It does not do as it states.  As I use only the medical aspects only I would expect it to work perfectly.

reviews.title: A good knock off
reviews.text: For the money this is a good watch

Heart Rate & Blood Oxygen Monitor: The health watch performs 24/7 high-precision monitoring of your heart rate. Plus measure your blood oxygen saturation (SpO2) level within seconds, let you understand how your body feels and prioprity your training endurance.

Fitness Tracker Watch & Sleep Tracking: Focus on your workout and exercise with built-in 14 sport modes, the fitness watch records your steps, distance, heart rate changes, calories burned, active minutes and more. Record your night sleep patterns such as deep sleep, light sleep, REM and creat intuitive charts. You can understand and improve your lifestyle for better health.

Fast Charging & Wide Compatibility: Say goodbye to daily recharge, 20 minutes charging offers one day wearing, 2 hours fully charging offers you one week worry-free wearing. reviews.title: Nice watch

I like the styling they have and the finish is always really nice.

reviews.title: A+
reviews.text: Works great!!!!!

reviews.title: Really neat little smartwatch.
reviews.text: If you’re looking for a smartwatch that won’t break the bank but still provide handy applications at your literal fingertips, then this is a great buy! Works with iPhone or Android and it’s super easy to set up. The battery life so far is pretty good but I also haven’t had it for too long so will update if anything goes haywire. So far it’s exactly as described by the seller and it arrived quickly and packaged nicely. Great for self-use or a gift.

reviews.title: Not a Good Choice for Me
reviews.text:
Like - was able to call and receive texts. Was able to answer a call on the watch. Pairing was easy. The app was easy.
Dislike - Once paired, the watch takes all your media volume away from your phone. You won't hear any music like from YouTube, text message alert or phone ringing. The watch has a little vibration that you can barely feel, when you receive a text or getting a phone call. All sounds like from Facebook videos or anything, goes through the watch. The only way I could find to get it to quit doing this, was to unpair the watch totally. I need military time but couldn't find a way to make the time in a 24 hour format. You have to put the watch together. The bands come apart from the watch. Everytime you move your hand the watch face lights up. This was definitely not what I was looking for at all. Would I buy this again? No.

reviews.title: Not durable, hard to latch
reviews.text:
I liked the shape of this band and how it looked on my sense. Unfortunately it was less than a week before it started snagging on blankets and towels. Then it started snagging my tighter woven clothes. Within a couple of weeks the area that was snagging on things bent outward resulting in it scratching myself and others along with snagging anything that got close to it.

It is also very hard to do the clasp with one hand. At least if you have a reduced level of manual dexterity. I did figure out how to put it on. Taking it off is easier.

I can't recommend this item. I sent it back for a refund.

reviews.title: Colorful band
reviews.text: I love the color . The band narrows once it comes off the fitbit. My only dislike is the extra band goes under the band instead of on top.

reviews.title: I have a love hate relationship with this band.
reviews.text: I love the look of this band on my Fitbit, it matches perfectly. How you fasten it is kind of a pain. It slips through and runs under itself, which prevents a floppy tail of band, but it can be tricky to do and adjust. Everything else about the band is great. It's lightweight, matches my Fitbit perfectly, and is easy to clean.

reviews.title: Nice Band
reviews.text: I like having options when it comes to the band of my Fitbit Versa3. This one looks nice. It's a little less casual than the silicone ones. It fits my Versa fine and was easy to attach. I wear my Fitbit on my left arm (I'm right handed). I found it a little more difficult to put on my wrist than my other bands. I was able to get it, but it took a few tries. Once on my wrist, my Versa feels secure and I'm not concerned about it coming undone.

reviews.title: Super Cute
reviews.text: Loving this wristband. It fits great and stays on without problems. Totally adjustable and wears really nicely. Couldn't be happier with this wristband.

title: Samsung Galaxy Watch3 2020 Smartwatch (Bluetooth + Wi-Fi + GPS) International Model (Bronze, 41mm)
description: The only smartwatch with a precise rotating bezel for navigating between apps. Larger screen, but lighter and thinner for more comfort: With its subtle rotating bezel, it's easier to see and focus on what's important on an even larger screen. The Galaxy Watch3 is thinner and smaller, and up to 15% lighter with a sophisticated look that, thanks to its reduced frame, is perfect for the wrist. Breathe easier with built-in oxygen measurement: The Galaxy Watch3 uses red LEDs and infrared rays to calculate your SpO2 levels or the amount of oxygen in your blood. Because oxygen saturation is directly related to physical activity, you can use the Galaxy Watch3 to push your routine to the next level. Enjoy a better sleep: The Galaxy Watch3 records your active sleep, deep sleep, and total sleep time to keep track and improve the quality of your sleep. Samsung partnered with the National Sleep Foundation to include educational content and provide tips on your device to help you sleep better. Do your best and then repeat it: With over 120 home workout programs to choose from, the Galaxy Watch3 helps you move your body at your own pace. Pick one from your phone and stream it on your TV. It will show you your heart rate in real-time while you exercise. Use the Ridge Sport strap for even more accurate stats. Continue your conversations: When you receive a new message, the Galaxy Watch3 shows your conversation history so you can follow them. You can also view images without needing an extra touch, making it easier to keep up while you're working out. Add some context with the smart answer: Respond to messages at all times and without missing a beat. The Galaxy Watch3's smart reply analyzes the texts and photos you receive and gives you possible answers in different categories, such as food, celebrations, selfies and much more.
features: 1.2 "(30.2mm) Super AMOLED, 360 x 360px Resolution, 16M Colors, CPU: Dual-Core 1.15GHz, 340mAh Battery, Tizen OS, Bluetooth, Wi-Fi

title: Withings Scanwatch - Hybrid Smartwatch & Activity Tracker with Connected GPS, Heart Rate Monitor, Sleep Monitor, Smart Notifications, Water Resistant with 30-day Battery Life, Android & iOS compatible
description: ScanWatch is the first hybrid smartwatch to scan vital parameters to detect heart health conditions and help improve overall fitness. ScanWatch boasts a medical-grade ECG, an oximeter for SpO2 measures, and an exceptional battery life of up to 30 days. Technologies: an electrocardiogram and an oximeter to provide on-demand essential vital parameters.
features: ELECTROCARDIOGRAM ON DEMAND — Detect atrial fibrillation or normal heart rhythm in just 30 seconds via ECG.
WRIST-BASED OXIMETRY — Provides on demand clinically validated oxygen saturation level (SpO2) in just 30 seconds.
HEART RATE TRACKING — Track heart rate continuously during workouts to optimize training, and monitor daily and overnight heart rate to help improve health over time.
TRACK BREATHING DISTURBANCES — Follow your nights and wake to signs of breathing disturbances in the app.
AUTOMATIC SLEEP MONITORING — Wake to a Sleep Score based on light & deep sleep cycles, interruptions, depth & regularity.
RECORD BATTERY LIFE — Spend more time moving and less time charging with a rechargeable battery that lasts up to 30 days.

SMART NOTIFICATIONS — Customize call, text, event & app notifications from your smartphone right on the watch screen. ScanWatch seamlessly syncs with the free Health Mate app via Bluetooth. Works with Alexa, Apple Health, Google Fit, Strava and 100+ top health & fitness apps.
SWAPPABLE WRISTBANDS — If you have multiple bands, it's easy to change them in seconds to wear ScanWatch your way: leather, silicone or metal.

reviews.title: Absolutely stellar watch but battery life is meh for a hybrid
reviews.text:
Withings wearer for almost two years here. Have had the Scanwatch for a couple months and had the Steel HR before that.

First off, if you're reading the reviews you should definitely buy either this watch or the Steel HR. I absolutely love it. It's gorgeous, the app is great, it fits in well to daily life. Looks fantastic whether suited up or wearing grubbies to work on the car. My doctor even hooked up tri-leads to me to compare the ECG with actual medical equipment and they thought it was pretty darn close! Same with O2 sat monitor and heart rate. Quality wise, on par with its excellent forerunner, the Steel HR. The functional twisting crown with haptic feedback is a nicer touch than the push button on the old one.

I have to ding it on one star because of the battery life and charge time compared to the prior model. My Steel HR lasted for about a month with all features enabled and charged almost completely in the time it took to take a shower. This one lasts about five days with all features enabled (I know, there are more features). But the bigger problem is charge time. I take the watch off for showers and that's a logical time to charge (obviously you want to wear this in your sleep). About 30 minutes does not come anywhere near to fully charging the battery. Just now it only went from 30-40%. So you need to find time to charge it during the day or occasionally not wear it while sleeping. I think I'm going to disable some of the continuous monitoring features which puts me back at my Steel HR just with sleep disturbance monitoring and O2 sat on demand.

Ultimately, if you want activity tracking, heart rate monitoring, enhanced sleep monitoring, ECG and O2 sat WHILE still wearing an attractive watch, this is hard to beat. If you don't care about ECG, O2 and sleep disturbance tracking the Steel HR is the watch to get as it's more or less the same just without those features and is cheaper. As to whether the ScanWatch is with the extra money over the Steel HR, I think that depends on how much you prioritize those extra features and battery life. If this would last a week plus on a charge I'd say the extra hundred bucks is a no brainer. But battery life as it is... tougher call.

One other note. While this watch will give you notifications, they're a bit cumbersome on the small screen. I have it turned off.

reviews.title: Screen fogged up after only a few days
reviews.text: Was exited by this smart watch, look and capabilities. But within a few short days the screen had fogged up on the inside without having come near water in any way. Very disappointing.

reviews.title: Great watch! Battery myth...
reviews.text:
The best looking, excellent build quality, thoughtful app. Notification is done nicely.

Battery Myth:

My first green horizon watch battery is very bad the battery dropped 14% on day one. I tried Amazfit, and it only drops 5% a day. I tried to disable a lot of things and it became about 7-8% a day.

Second Blue horizon, more than 24 hours later, it still shows 100%. I could not believe it. Almost like I complained and they did something remotely and manipulated the battery meter... 😊

Sleep Track is nice and main reason I bought it.

reviews.title: great appearance, perfect for work
reviews.text: I love the product. The ease of use, it's intuitive nature. It looks like a regular watch-quite stylish in my opinion, but it functions like a smart watch but with just the essentials that I need. If you are regularly using the smart watch functions with blue tooth to your phone--the battery life is closer to two weeks than a month.

reviews.title: Update:  Watch cannot keep time!  Needs frequent adjustment Not trustworthy!
reviews.text:
Update: Watch now 10 months old and does not keep accurate time. Initially a couple months ago, I noticed the time difference and using instructions adjusted it, thinking it must have been an odd glitch. I am used to watches that rarely need to be adjusted and thought a Hybrid Smartwatch would be smart and never be off time. Boy was I wrong.

Since writing the original glowing review, last May 2022 which was two weeks after purchase. I have had to adjust the time several times. The first time it was off it was 12 minutes difference. Right now it is off 5 minutes. A couple weeks ago it was off 4 minutes. This is not an isolated incident. Interestingly, the hands do not match the digital time, but all the same, both are off. Right now the hands read exactly 4:30 while the digital is 4:31 even though the real time according to my computer and Samsung S21 phone is 4:36. This is really a shame given the watch cost $300. IMO, the watch is unusable if you cannot trust it for its most basic function.

reviews.title: Nice resolution
reviews.text:
I bought this watch because of the high-resolution display. And that's what I got, no more, no less.

Upon first impression, I can tell the display has crisp graphics. The touch screen is responsive. The processor is fast. Overall, the phone itself is nice.

The app, on the other hand, is awful. It is intuitive, but it loses Bluetooth connectivity without reason. This is the only app that I've seen that will move forward and backward during a dial sync. When I switch to certain dials, the progress bar will reach 61%, then count back down to 60%, then 59%, then start going back up. It's nice to see honesty in an app, but it's just strange.

I didn't test notifications from other apps, but no SMS text messages came through. The setup is simple and easy with SMS notifications settings on its own section. But once set up, no messages came through.

Battery life? What battery life? After a fully charge, this watch drained to 90% in the 15 minutes I used to overlook the features and set up the app. This from a 330mAh battery. At this rate, the battery will be depleted in less than two hours.

reviews.title: Junk
reviews.text: What a piece of junk. The instructions don't match the watch or the Amazon description and is written in awful broken English. And the app--- AWFUL. Navigation is bad, the English on the app is even worse than the instructions. I'm seriously concerned that downloading the app has somehow compromised anything on my phone. While I understand Amazon is a gigantic company that can't police every single item for sale, this is just BLATANTLY bad. In case my review isn't already clear, DO NOT BUY.

reviews.title: Great watch for the price
reviews.text: It was very difficult for me to set up this watch until I scanned the scan code from the pamphlet. The directions weren't easy. I think I would like a watch a little smaller but I like the shape and bands.  The price was great. I'm still not sure about the sleep mode, nothing seems to be registering. Steps are showing up which is cool, BPM is registering. Still figuring it out. Arrived promptly.  Additional info: the watch is NOT tracking my erratic sleep pattern, which I really needed it to do. I also found the size of the round watch intrusive to my long sleeve shirts and arm. Loved the pink and green bands and the color of the watch face. Steps are also not being accurately recorded. So sad, really had high hopes for this.

reviews.title: Worth the money n saved my life

reviews.title: Superb smart watch! Excellent value! 🙌🏻💰
reviews.text:
This is an excellent watch especially for those who are very concerned about their overall health. I have a lot of health challenges and so it's important for me to be monitoring certain aspects like blood pressure, heart rate, and oxygen saturation. I'm typically someone who has high blood pressure have a pre-existing condition. This determines whether I can donate plasma, if I'm consuming too many calorie rich foods or if I should be concerned for my heart rate.

I love how this watch is very mindful of how long you've been sitting because I'm guilty of spending hours on the couch. Despite my poor health, it still essential to get up every once in a while and move around to get the blood flowing. This watch has excellent battery life I've only had to charge it one time since I've had it and I've had it now for over a month! Even being connected to Bluetooth on your phone it does not drain the battery quickly which is awesome! Pairing was super easy, just download the app pair it and set it and forget it. The watch and my phone always per immediately I've never had to fuss around with anything just great! I would highly recommend this watch to anyone. Certainly keeps me active and gives me all the important information I need to know on a daily basis 🙌🏻👍🏻🫁🏆

reviews.title: Pretty good
reviews.text:
Pretty good smartwatch. I needed something to replace my Galaxy Active, but didn't want to spend $100+ on something with a horrible battery life. I bought this one and for a while I was disappointed. I had to charge the watch each night and the steps weren't as accurate. I changed the setting so that the screen doesn't turn on when you move your wrist and that has saved the battery big time. I'm on day 4 and only down to 50% which means I'm now able to track sleep as well. I still think the steps aren't as accurate because it almost matches the steps in my phone's health app, but I'm notorious for leaving my phone places. I also miss being able to limit the options for exercise types in the watch face. I have to scroll through a long list each time. Overall, pretty good product for a cheaper price.

Update: I originally gave this 5 stars, but I have to take 2 away. A few days ago, the watch all of a sudden stopped counting steps. For the price, it was perfect until it stopped working. Back to the drawing board.

description:
Specification:
●Name: Garmin Forerunner 45S wristband  ●Color: Black, Blue, Green, Navy, Orange, Purple, Red, Teal, White, Grey, Pink ●Packing: 1 x Garmin Forerunner 45S Band, 1 x Screwdriver, 4 x Spare Pins  ●Band Wrist Size: 13*2.5*0.5cm/ 5.1*0.98*0.2inch  ●Package Size:17*6*0.5cm/ 6.7*2.4*0.2inch ●Weight:27g/0.06lb
Advantage:
●Soft and Healthy Material -- It is made of environmental silicone material, no peculiar smell and harmless, soft and durable.  ●One size for adjustable fit -- Holes in Forerunner 45S Watch band for adjusting a proper length (Fits 5.5"-8.1" wrist).  ●Easy On/Off -- The screwdrivers and screws made it easier to replace the Watbro band of Garmin Forerunner 45S watch.  ●Perfect Gifts Ideas -- The superior silicone band with vogue design is also the best choice as a BIRTHDAY GIFT, ANNIVERSARY GIFT and ANY OTHER FESTIVAL GIFT. Get one for your friend, lover or family.
Warranty:
●If you receive a defective item or unsatisfied with your purchase, please feel free to contact us. WATBRO covers all the cost during the replacement or refund.  ●Contact Way: Sold by Watbro>>Ask a Question>>Select your issue>>Send e-mail.  ●If you are satisfied with our products, we look forward to your support. We will try our best to provide perfect shopping experience for every customer in our Amazon shop. Your satisfaction is our best motivation.
features: ❀【Compatible Models】- This replacement silicone band ONLY compatible with Garmin Forerunner 45S Smart Watch. NOT for Forerunner 45 watch or any other models.

❀【Install & Adjust Simply】- Screws and screw drivers are free provided to install, very easy to put it on and remove. Free size fits most wrists (5.5"-8.1"/ 139mm-206mm), with plenty of spots for size adjustment.

❀【Environmental Material】- Using high quality soft silicone material, which is soft and durable. Protecting your Garmin Forerunner 45S from dirt and scratches. Fit securely for running, dancing or working out, perfect for daily and nightly wear.

❀【Various Colors】- Delighted varied colors personalize your wristband to fits your mood and outfits in daily life. Personalized Your Garmin Forerunner 45S Smart Watch with this refined replacement wristband.
❀【Secure Design】- The connect part locks onto the Forerunner 45S watch precisely and securely, the metal clasp works well in holding the device in place. Enjoy your sports activities with them.

reviews.title: Perfect replacement
reviews.text: Exact replacement and a fraction of the price you would pay if you bought it from the store

reviews.title: Blue is more purple
reviews.text: The blue is more purple than it is blue. The color was mostly true to its display photo though, but just a word of caution in case if anyone really wanted a true blue. As for the band itself, I can’t say much about durability since I just installed it. This band comes with 2 securing bands whereas the original Garmin comes with 1. I also feel like the band doesn’t meet flush with the watch face as well as the original Garmin but it’s not bad. This band is also a little stiffer than the floppy Garmin band, and I think I actually like the feel of this stiffer band.

reviews.title: Fits 45s perfectly
reviews.text: Worked perfectly as a replacement band for the 45s. Not sure why other reviewers are having issues because it’s great!

reviews.title: I wanted the teal specifically
reviews.text: I replaced my watch band as soon as they came and it's been on since summer with no complaints.  I appreciate the fact that they send a little screwdriver with the set, it's so helpful not having to find something that small on your own.  Nice product!

title: EURANS Smart Watch 42mm Bluetooth Calling (Answer/Make Call) HD Touch Screen IP68 Waterproof Fitness Tracker for Android and iOS Phones, Blood Oxygen & Heart Rate Monitor, Sleep Tracking for Men Women
features: 【𝐁𝐥𝐮𝐞𝐭𝐨𝐨𝐭𝐡 𝐃𝐢𝐚𝐥 𝐂𝐚𝐥𝐥𝐢𝐧𝐠 & 𝐀𝐧𝐬𝐰𝐞𝐫】 When connecting the watch with your phone with bluetooth, you are able to answer and make calls directly via this smartwatch with its built-in microphone and speaker. 𝐍𝐨𝐭𝐞: 𝐎𝐧𝐥𝐲 𝐟𝐮𝐧𝐜𝐭𝐢𝐨𝐧𝐚𝐥 𝐰𝐡𝐞𝐧 𝐭𝐡𝐞 𝐰𝐚𝐭𝐜𝐡 𝐩𝐚𝐢𝐫𝐢𝐧𝐠 𝐰𝐢𝐭𝐡 𝐲𝐨𝐮𝐫 𝐩𝐡𝐨𝐧𝐞, 𝐚𝐧𝐝 𝐞𝐧𝐚𝐛𝐥𝐞 𝐫𝐞𝐥𝐞𝐯𝐚𝐧𝐭 𝐚𝐜𝐜𝐞𝐬𝐬 𝐢𝐧 𝐀𝐏𝐏.

【𝟒𝟐𝐦𝐦 𝟔𝟎 𝐅𝐏𝐒 𝐓𝐨𝐮𝐜𝐡 𝐒𝐜𝐫𝐞𝐞𝐧】Features a 42mm (1.7'') coloful touch screen, narrow bezels provide 20% more visible area allow you see more information at a glance and easier touch control on this fitness watch. Enjoy the vivid animation with this 60 FPS screen.

【𝐘𝐨𝐮𝐫 𝐇𝐞𝐚𝐥𝐭𝐡 𝐀𝐬𝐬𝐢𝐬𝐭𝐚𝐧𝐜𝐞 & 𝐒𝐥𝐞𝐞𝐩 𝐓𝐫𝐚𝐜𝐤𝐢𝐧𝐠】Features blood oxygen & heart rate monitor, this fitness tracker can track your heart rate all day and alert you once your heart rate reach safe threshold. It can track your sleep peroid: Light, Deep and REM sleep stage. If you'd like to know your blood oxygen level, just a press on the watch and it will start to mearsure.

【𝐅𝐮𝐥𝐥𝐲 𝐅𝐮𝐧𝐜𝐭𝐢𝐨𝐧 𝐟𝐨𝐫 𝐅𝐢𝐭𝐧𝐞𝐬𝐬】Up to 100 sports modes, this watch will meet all your need on exercise! After connected to your phone, it can also record your ourdoor route and display in App. Features weather forecast can let you know how the weathe going and plan your exercise!

【𝐆𝐫𝐞𝐚𝐭 𝐁𝐚𝐭𝐭𝐞𝐫𝐲 𝐋𝐢𝐟𝐞 & 𝐁𝐥𝐮𝐞𝐭𝐨𝐨𝐭𝐡 𝟓.𝟑】290mAh battery provides up to 8 days using or 30 days standby. Equips with bluetooth 5.3, compatible with Android 9.0 and iOS 11.0 or above, you can experience faster, wider and low delay connection.

reviews.title: Easy set up and can text and phone calls
reviews.text: I like the looks and it tells me to get off my ass and move.

reviews.title: Decently priced
reviews.text: Chose this watch because of the simplicity and overall look.  The step counts and sleep features work very well.  Battery life is approximately 2 days use when using the push button feature.  If you enable the sensor to come on with your wrist approximately 1 day use.  Charge works very well and quickly.  The downfall is definitely the rubber banding.  The piece that holds the excess band tends to move.  Call feature is ok for the price and messaging is ok.  I primarily needed for an alarm, clock and date.

reviews.title: great smartwatch
reviews.text: I bought this for my uncle for his birthday. He wanted a smart watch to monitor his health. He liked it and it was easy for him to set up.

reviews.title: Great
reviews.text: I had an Apple Watch before this. This is really no different than the Apple Watch,  everything that worked on there works fine here! Did find a screen protector  it is (Smaat 1.7”) it fits perfect! And touch screen still works fine. as far as I can tell there are no other bands made for this type of connection, which is kind of ridiculous. So if the band breaks, you literally have to buy a new watch don’t like that! Also, wish it could at least have the temperature on the screen! And there are only certain screens that have the power level or day and date, and you cannot pick a screen from your photos, etc. and add the date. Just trying to inform people of all of the things that I was looking for in reviews and no one ever mentioned any of these hopefully it helps!

reviews.title: Nice watch!
reviews.text: I bought this watch to track my fitness mainly.  I'm not the type of person who's into gadgets per se but I think this is a winner.  It's not expensive but still stylish and functional.

title: Smart Watch(Answer/Make Call), 2023 Newest 1.69'' HD LCD Bluetooth Smart Watches for Men Women for Android Phones and iPhone, 2022 Fitness Tracker Watch Supports Heart Rate/SpO2/Sleep Monitor, Black
features: 2023 NEWEST BLUETOOTH CALL SMART WATCH - Built-in high-fidelity speaker and crystal-quality microphone, the sound quality of calls and music playback has been greatly guaranteed. Men smart watch supports storing 8 intimate contacts and call records, features a dial pad function also. You can make/receive calls on the smart watch without taking out your smartphone, making your hands free. It's the best Thanksgiving and Christmas gift for men/women.

OVERTAKE YOUR EXPECTATIONS - AooDen smart watch supports answering calls/dialing. The super-sleek 8.8mm watch body is made from lightweight yet durable zinc alloy, with a 1.69 inches high-definition LCD screen to present extraordinary visual enjoyment. Da Fit APP supports custom watch dials, or even uploads your own photo as the watch face for true personalization.

ACCESS YOUR WORLD FROM WRIST - Compatible with Android 4.4, IOS 8.4 and above. Lift your wrist to light up the watch screen, then check the SMS and various APP notifications on the watch(Note: Cannot text to reply). Built-in BLE5.0 system. After 2 hours of charging, it will support 12 hours of talk, 5 days of heavy use, and 4 weeks of standby.

4 HEALTH METRICS IN A WATCH - Adopts the latest infrared pulse measurement technology and PCG optical monitoring technology. Support the measurement of blood oxygen, and the monitoring of heart rate and sleep data. Just turn on the 24-hour heart rate monitoring in the ''Da Fit'' APP to monitor your sleep status (deep sleep, light sleep, REM time). Wear it now to meet your healthier life.

TRAIN LIKE A PRO - 8 sports modes are available, which will record your exercise time, heart rate and calorie consumption in running, skipping and other sports. Turn on location permissions and also record your route and distance while running. IP68 waterproof support for hand washing and running in the rain. (Note: Sauna and hot bath are not supported.)

ALWAYS ONLINE FOR YOU - In order to allow you to select a comfortable, buy the rest assured that with the peace of mind. Our technical support team is available 24/7 online, if you have any questions about the product, please feel free to contact us through the official Amazon channel.
WARM TIPS: Please charge the watch before using it for the first time.

reviews.title: Excellent product 100% recommended
reviews.text: Wonderful smartwatch, answer calls, always have vital signs controlled, excellent resolution as well as synchronization with the application. Bring an additional strap and excellent cable. You can change the images as well as customize any photo to your liking.

reviews.title: So pretty
reviews.text:
There are so many fitness trackers on Amazon, how do you pick? I chose this one for my wife as it’s rose gold in color and looks really pretty. I love that you don’t need to buy extra watch bands and it’s ready to go.

It has great functionality like sleep tracking and heart rate monitor. It’s really pretty too.

reviews.title: Good watch
reviews.text: Nice looking watch, at first the watch wasnt working properly.  I reached out to the seller and the seller responded quickly to fix the situation.  They send me a new replacement immediately.  Im.very happy with me watch now and glad to be doing business with a seller that backs up their product.  Thank you

reviews.title: Large, clear and detailed visuals
reviews.text: I like the feature that allows you to make and receive calls, which is convenient. The only concern is that you have to disconnect the watch's Bluetooth if you want to use your phone's speaker.

reviews.title: Good watch for the money
reviews.text: Battery lasts for several days, easy to use. I disabled phone because I didn't want to submit those around me to conversations
